title: MICHELANGELO Frying Pan with Lid 26cm, Non-Toxic Stone-Derived with Bakelite Handle, Granite Pan for Induction, Cream White
features: Nonstick Cooking Performance - The white granite coating of this 26cm frying pan with lid is triple-layered for super non-stick cooking performance and durability. Food slides right off our nonstick frying pan with lid for optimum cooking results. Cleaning is a breeze.

Heats Quickly & Evenly - Made of durable 3 layers bottom provides better performance of even heat distribution and warp-resistance, releasing foods effortlessly. This nonstick frying pans is designed for professional multiple cooking use and allows you fry up your favorite breakfast, eggs, veggies, meats and more with less oil for healthy diet.

Conveniently Designed Glass Lid - Heat resistant glass lid of the non stick frying pan makes viewing food easy from start to finish. It seals in the flavor and nutrients for a healthier and better tasting food.

Suitable For All Stoves - This non stick frying pan with lid 26cm is made with a flat bottom which allows our nonstick cookware to work on all stove tops including induction, gas, electric, ceramic. Dishwasher safe.

Healthy & Non-toxic - The natural mineral nonstick coating is ultra durable while remaining 100% free of PFOA, PTFA, lead, and cadmium, ideal for healthy cooking. Choose MICHELANGELO White Granite Frying Pan with Lid 26cm for greener and safer cooking.
